title: UniBond No More Nails All Materials Grab Adhesive, High Strength Bonding, No Nails Required, White, 390 g Cartridge
features: High resistance – This highly secure construction adhesive provides high quality bonding and sealing solutions for all your household needs, both inside and outside

Universal applicability – Suitable for fixing most common building materials inside and outside the house including as a brick, stone and tile adhesive. It's also suitable as a glass and wood adhesive
Highly flexible – The strong adhesion created by this No More Nails Adhesive also provides high flexibility in the join whilst maintaining a secure bond
Extreme resistance – This construction adhesive can handle outdoor weather conditions and is UV-, as well as extreme temperature resistant (-30°C to + 80°C)
Delivery Scope and details – Unibond No More Nails Interior And Exterior white construction adhesive in standard cartridge (390g), 1 cartridge, article number: B087VK18G5
